customer_query: My vitamin c serum arrived leaking and the pump was broken. Can I get a refund?
resolution: Ask for order confirmation and photos, then route to return policy. Damaged items reported within 30 days can be refunded or replaced after validation.

customer_query: The compact hair dryer stopped working after one month. Is this covered by warranty?
resolution: Verify SKU and proof of purchase. Electrical items have a 12 month limited warranty for manufacturing defects.

customer_query: I did not receive my PDF Studio Pro license key email.
resolution: Check account email and spam folder, then resend digital license. If delivery cannot be confirmed, escalate to software fulfillment.

customer_query: The cloud backup subscription renewed and I want to cancel it with a refund.
resolution: Explain renewal cancellation. Refund eligibility depends on renewal date and usage; route to payment refund policy.

customer_query: My baby monitor delivery was late and the battery drains overnight.
resolution: Check carrier status for late delivery. For battery defect, offer replacement or return if within policy window.

customer_query: One cap is missing from the anti-colic bottle set. Can support replace the part?
resolution: Collect order details and product photo. Missing parts can be replaced when reported within 14 days of delivery.
